message:
perf(reactor): switch from std::collections::HashMap to hashbrown::HashMap

All four reactor backends (io_uring, kqueue, macOS, Windows IOCP) used
std::collections::HashMap for token-to-source mappings. hashbrown
provides the same API with better performance characteristics for the
insert/lookup/remove patterns used in I/O event dispatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
